title: MCCB Price in Pakistan 2026 — Moulded Case Circuit Breaker 100A 250A 400A Complete Buyer Guide
summary_html: MCCB price in Pakistan 2026: 100A from Rs. 4,500 (budget) to Rs. 55,000 (branded); 250A from Rs. 12,000 to Rs. 95,000; 400A from Rs. 22,000 to Rs. 160,000; 630A from Rs. 38,000 to Rs. 260,000+. Complete guide covering frame sizes 100F–630F, Pakistan ambient temperature derating, breaking capacity (Ics vs Icu), WAPDA incomer requirements, motor protection MCCB selection, generator changeover wiring, and brand comparison.
author: CNC Electric Pakistan
shopify_status: pre-commit only — HTTP:000 cloud IP block
